notes:
The game starts loading, then it's showing next stuff subsequently:
1. Onacon
2. Teyon
3. Unreal Engine
4. Intel Arc Graphics
5. Crash... popup showing "The UE-Game Game has crashed and will close. Fatal error!"

I have tried GE-Proton8-32, Proton Experimental, Proton 8.0-5. All with same result. Only Proton 7.0-6 will result in functioning game, though VERY slow!
